nasb.text: Then Shimei the son of Gera, the Benjamite who was from Bahurim, hurried and came down with the men of Judah to meet King David.

esv.text: And Shimei the son of Gera, the Benjaminite, from Bahurim, hurried to come down with the men of Judah to meet King David.

cnv.text: 巴戶琳的便雅憫人，基拉的兒子示每，急忙與猶大人一同下去迎接大衛王。

ccb.text: 来自巴户琳的便雅悯人基拉的儿子示每也急忙跟着犹大人赶来迎接大卫王，
